response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI infrastructure, and open-source platforms, with notable contributions at Google and Meta, but lacks clear evidence of AI product leadership, advanced degrees in AI, or director-level strategic impact required for this role, and his startup experience is ambiguous (e.g., 'Founder, Amazon' appears erroneous).
strengths: Proven AI-agent infrastructure work at Google with MCP and agentic workflows
Extensive cloud and full-stack engineering across Google, Meta, and open-source projects
Strong track record of building and open-sourcing technical tools (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective)
concerns: No evidence of Master's/PhD in AI or formal AI research background
Ambiguous employment claim ('Founder, Amazon') raises credibility concerns
Lacks demonstrated strategic leadership in cloud/AI product roadmaps or customer advisory at director level
